story.iWant: basic popup HTML và React entry point

subtasks.subtask: Add HTML structure với DOCTYPE, html, head, body
Add script tag để load popup.js (will be built)
Add basic CSS for popup sizing (400x600px)
Create simple component: displays "Hello Extension" text
Import và render component trong popup.tsx
Add basic styling (use Tailwind classes if available)
Build extension (using build config từ Story 10.3)
Load extension in Chrome Developer mode
Click extension icon trong browser toolbar
Test popup closes khi clicking outside
Add CSS để set popup size: width 400px, height 600px
Verify popup displays at correct size
Verify popup is scrollable nếu content exceeds size
Test popup sizing on different screen resolutions
Test React entry point renders without errors
Test popup opens khi clicking extension icon

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Basic "Hello Extension" component renders in popup
Popup opens khi clicking extension icon

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: Popup structure: `extension/src/popup/popup.tsx` (React entry point), `extension/public/popup.html` (HTML template). Popup size: 400x600px recommended.

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: React 18+ for UI framework. Use ReactDOM.createRoot() (React 18 API). Tailwind CSS for styling. Popup opens when clicking extension icon.

doc.title: Suna.so Browser Extension - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want basic popup HTML và React entry point, So that popup UI can be developed. Acceptance criteria include popup.html, popup.tsx, basic component, popup opens, và popup sizing.

doc.title: Story 10.2: Extension Manifest Configuration
doc.snippet: Manifest configured với popup: `action.default_popup: "popup.html"`. Popup opens khi clicking extension icon.

doc.title: Story 10.3: Build Configuration & Shared Code Setup
doc.snippet: Build configuration created với popup entry point. Build produces `popup.js` và `popup.html` in `dist/` directory. Path aliases configured để import từ frontend.

file.reason: Manifest references popup.html. Popup HTML must exist at path specified in manifest (typically `popup.html` in dist/).
React entry point location. Create popup.tsx here to render React app into popup.html root element.

Popup HTML template. Contains React root element `
` và script tag to load popup.js.
Reference for React setup patterns. Extension popup should follow similar React initialization pattern.

constraint.description: Must use React 18+ (matches frontend). Use ReactDOM.createRoot() API (React 18), not deprecated ReactDOM.render().
Popup size: 400x600px recommended. Can be set via CSS. Browser may enforce minimum/maximum sizes. Test với different content sizes.

Popup HTML must have React root element: `
`. Element must exist before React tries to render. Script tag loads popup.js.
Popup HTML và JS processed by build tool (Story 10.3). Build output: `dist/popup.html` và `dist/popup.js`. Manifest references `popup.html` from dist/.
Use Tailwind CSS (matches frontend). Popup-specific styles can be added. Ensure styles don't conflict với browser default styles.
Manifest `action.default_popup` references `popup.html`. Build output must match this reference. Popup opens when clicking extension icon.

interface.name: Popup HTML Template
interface.signature: với script tag loading popup.js

tests.standards: Testing standards: Verify popup.html structure is valid, test React entry point renders without errors, verify Hello Extension component displays, test popup opens khi clicking extension icon, verify popup size is correct (400x600px), test popup functionality (open, close, display). Use Chrome extension management và DevTools để verify.

test.idea: Verify popup.html structure is valid HTML và contains React root element
Verify popup.html includes script tag to load popup.js
Test React entry point (popup.tsx) renders without errors (check DevTools Console)
Verify React root element is found và React renders successfully
Verify Hello Extension component displays "Hello Extension" text trong popup
Check component renders correctly với basic styling
Click extension icon trong browser toolbar và verify popup opens
Verify popup displays content (Hello Extension component)
Test popup closes khi clicking outside popup area
Measure popup size và verify it's 400x600px (or close to it)
Test popup với content that exceeds size và verify scrolling works
Test popup sizing on different screen resolutions
